title: pleopeltis × sordidula
intro: Pleopeltis × sordidula is a hybrid species of epiphytic fern, resulting from the cross between Pleopeltis polypodioides and Pleopeltis sordidula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis × sordidula include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, often combined with other medicinal plants, to create remedies for various health concerns.
